HERO.TITLE: Your trades log themselves. No more guessing what's working or not.
HERO.SUBTITLE: Logynqo helps you track performance, review execution, and spot repeatable patterns without the spreadsheet mess.

PROOF.ITEM_1_BODY: Import broker activity automatically and keep every position logged in one clean place.
PROOF.ITEM_2_BODY: Review setups, outcomes, and recurring mistakes without digging through screenshots.
PROOF.ITEM_3_BODY: Understand what your edge looks like when you have every trade tagged and time-stamped.

JOURNAL.EYEBROW: A simpler way to keep a trading journal
JOURNAL.TITLE: A simpler way to keep a trading journal
JOURNAL.SUBTITLE: Track every idea, every setup, and every result in one place so your review process stays consistent.
JOURNAL.POINT_1: Automatic import from MT4 and MT5
JOURNAL.POINT_4: Simple review flow after every session

SETUP.TITLE: Setup in minutes
SETUP.SUBTITLE: You do not need a complicated routine to start journaling with discipline.
SETUP.STEP_1_BODY: Start with a clean workspace and your own private trading journal.
SETUP.STEP_2_BODY: Use the EA link and API key to sync trades from MetaTrader automatically.
SETUP.STEP_3_BODY: Open your dashboard, inspect patterns, and build a repeatable feedback loop.

METRICS.TITLE: Review. Refine.
METRICS.SUBTITLE: See what's actually working once your journal captures enough context to make your data meaningful.
METRICS.CARD_2_BODY: Calculated automatically from your closed trades. No spreadsheets, no manual math.

WHY.TITLE: Why it helps
WHY.SUBTITLE: Journaling only works if it is fast enough to use and clear enough to trust.
WHY.REASON_1_BODY: Build a light routine that makes reflection part of execution, not a separate project.
WHY.REASON_2_BODY: Notice recurring overtrading, late entries, and ignored setups before they calcify.
WHY.REASON_3_BODY: Find which conditions actually produce good trades and which ones only feel productive.

PRICING.TITLE: Simple Pricing
PRICING.SUBTITLE: Start free, then upgrade when you want more history and deeper review tools.
PRICING.FREE_DESC: Best for getting started with your first trade journal routine.
PRICING.PRO_DESC: For traders who want unlimited tracking and tighter feedback loops.

CTA.TITLE: Start tracking your trades automatically
CTA.SUBTITLE: Join Logynqo and build a review habit around data you can actually use.

LOGIN.TITLE: Welcome Back
LOGIN.SUBTITLE: Sign in to your trading journal.

MARKETING.SUBTITLE: Pick up where you left off. All your trade data, analytics, and insights are waiting for you.
MARKETING.FEATURE_1_DESC: Deep-dive into trade performance with automatic excursion metrics.
MARKETING.FEATURE_2_DESC: Your trades sync automatically. No manual entry, ever.

ONBOARDING.WELCOME_SUBTITLE: Connect your MT4/MT5 and start tracking your trades automatically
ONBOARDING.TITLE: Get Started
ONBOARDING.STEP1_DESC: Download the Expert Advisor file and add it to your MetaTrader data folder.
ONBOARDING.STEP2_DESC: Open MetaTrader 5, go to File → Open Data Folder → MQL5 → Experts, paste the EA file, and restart MT5. Drag the EA onto your chart and enable AutoTrading.
ONBOARDING.STEP2_WEBREQUEST: Important: go to Tools → Options → Expert Advisors, enable WebRequest and add the following URL to the allowed list:
ONBOARDING.STEP3_DESC: Copy your API key below and paste it into the EA settings in MT5. Your trades will start syncing automatically.

LIMIT_BANNER.MESSAGE: You've reached your monthly limit of 25 trades.
LIMIT_BANNER.UPGRADE: Upgrade to Pro for unlimited trades.

API_KEY.TITLE: API KEY
API_KEY.DESC: Use this key to connect your Expert Advisor (MT4/MT5) to Logynqo.
API_KEY.REGENERATE_BODY: Are you sure? Your EA will stop working until you update the key.
API_KEY.DOWNLOAD_EA_HINT: Download the Expert Advisor file and insert your API key.

DANGER.TITLE: DANGER ZONE
DANGER.DESC: These actions are irreversible. Please proceed with caution.
DANGER.DELETE_HINT: Permanently delete your account and all trade data.
DANGER.MODAL_BODY: This will permanently delete your account and all associated trade data. This action cannot be undone.

TUTORIALS.TITLE: TUTORIALS & RESOURCES
TUTORIALS.DESC: Learn how to set up Logynqo and get the most out of your trading journal.
TUTORIALS.CARD1_DESC: Step-by-step guide to installing the Expert Advisor in MetaTrader 5.
TUTORIALS.CARD2_DESC: Overview of the dashboard, trade tracking, and performance analytics.
